title: vincetoxicum officinale var. luteolum
intro: Vincetoxicum officinale var. luteolum, also known as the yellow swallowwort, is a plant species belonging to the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vincetoxicum officinale var. luteolum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
